rationale: For Portugal, the most relevant development remains the potential US-Iran deal and its effect on global energy prices; all other headlines are distant from Portuguese daily concerns.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal near, Khamenei funeral announced
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal remains close but unsigned; Khamenei's death could accelerate or complicate negotiations, with potential impact on global oil/gas prices affecting Portuguese energy costs.

top_events.title: Switzerland population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Switzerland's proposed 10-million population cap is a minor EU-adjacent political development with negligible direct impact on Portugal.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved
top_events.summary: A major media merger approved in the US; minimal direct impact on Portuguese daily life, though it may affect media content availability in Europe.
